Comment: Data pipeline lab: Task, Choice, Wait, Parallel, Map, Pass, Retry, Catch, Succeed, Fail

ValidateInput.Comment: TASK state: invokes a Lambda. RETRY handles transient errors with exponential backoff; CATCH routes fatal errors to the failure handler.

IsInputValid.Comment: CHOICE state: branches on the is_valid flag returned by validation.

InvalidInputFail.Comment: FAIL state: terminates the execution with an explicit error and cause.
InvalidInputFail.Cause: Payload failed validation: required fields missing or malformed.

WaitForBatchWindow.Comment: WAIT state: pauses 5 seconds (simulates a batching window). Also supports Timestamp/SecondsPath for dynamic waits.

EnrichAndCheckQuality.Comment: PARALLEL state: runs enrichment and quality-check branches concurrently. Output is an array with one element per branch. Catch fails fast on bad data.

ProcessRecords.Comment: MAP state: fans out over $.records, invoking the processor once per item. MaxConcurrency bounds parallelism (critical for downstream rate limits).

BuildSummary.Comment: PASS state: no compute — reshapes the payload using Parameters and intrinsic functions.

Notify.Comment: Final TASK: emits the summary (stand-in for SNS/EventBridge).

PipelineSucceeded.Comment: SUCCEED state: explicit happy-path terminal state.

HandleFailure.Comment: PASS used as an error normalizer before the terminal Fail — a common real-world pattern (you could also alert here).

PipelineFailed.Cause: A task raised an unrecoverable error. See error_detail in the execution history.
